title: DimensionalLayers
description: Allow you to generate all dimensions in one!
body:
## Overview
This is addon for CubicChunks which allow you to generate dimensions from your modpack in one dimension layer by layer.
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hohserg1/DimensionalLayers/master/media/devlog/2023-11-19_02.53.46.png)
When you create a new world, select the world type "DimensionalLayers".

It's possible to configure what dimension will be at what layer, some settings per layer, and save preset.
![world preset customization gui](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hohserg1/DimensionalLayers/master/media/preset%20gui.png)
![layer settings gui](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hohserg1/DimensionalLayers/master/media/layer%20settings%201.png)

_First entering the world may take ~5 mins, so don't worry, just wait._

_It's also recommended to use something like WorldBorder/CCPregen for pre-generate map._


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VgKhREvShA8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Check out [video dev log playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwlzJC9LWHVv9gmAq86vN2b9ABrWdeQEs)

## Technical details
If you wanna to register icon of your dimension which named "<modid>:<name>", you should to put texture at `assets/<modid>/textures/gui/dimension_layers_background/<name>.png`.

Missed <modid> counted as "minecraft".

## Gratitudes

- Thanks my friends @WildTan, @virox_t, @liahim85 for early feedback!
- Thanks @Barteks2x for continuing CC development and support!
- Thank you for playing this mod!
